---
title: "SEM"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("Code/paths+packages.R"))
library(sf)
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(corrr)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(beepr)
library(glue)
library(cowplot)
library(ggExtra)
library(piecewiseSEM)
library(easystats)
set.seed(4) # For reproducibility
gpSites <- c("#1b9e77", "#d95f02", "#7570b3")
```

# Load Data

```{r}
sheet_id <- "1uQquFaVpRFs5y4UDBrqKtq1Oo3dW7zXLwFoIv-gle6g"
sheet_names <- c("Talladega", "Paint Rock", "Weyerhaeuser")

all_sheets <- map(sheet_names, \(name) {
  read_sheet(sheet_id, sheet = name, col_types = "c") |>
    mutate(Site = name)
})

seMaint <- bind_rows(all_sheets) |> 
    janitor::clean_names() |> 
  mutate(
    temp_c = coalesce(temp_c, temperature_c),
    stage_m = coalesce(staff_gauge_height_m, staff_gauge_height),
    # Safely combine date + time
    Date = mdy(date)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site = site, Date, connected = connected_and_flowing, upstream = upstream_tribs_flowing, site_notes, do_mg_l, stage_m, temp_c) |> 
  mutate(
    connected = str_to_lower(connected),
    upstream = str_to_lower(upstream),
    flow_state = case_when(
      connected == "yes" ~ "Flowing",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "yes" ~ "Pooled",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "no" ~ "Dry",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    flow_state = case_when(
      (flow_state %in% c("Dry", NA)) &
        str_detect(str_to_lower(site_notes), "\\b(flow|flowing|pool|pooled|isolated|low)\\b") ~ "Pooled",
      TRUE ~ flow_state
    )
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, wetQf = flow_state) |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      str_starts(Site, "T") ~ "TAL",
      str_starts(Site, "W") ~ "WHR",
      str_starts(Site, "P") ~ "PRF",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))
```

```{r}
sites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Sites")
streams <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Streams")

flowObs <- read_csv(here("Metadata/FlowObs.csv"))

streamLight <- read_csv(here("Data/streamLight/predLight/all_sites_results.csv")) |> 
  rename(Site = Site_ID) |> 
  mutate(
    Date = as_date(local_time),
    Site = case_when(
    Site == "SFM01" ~ "KNZ",
    Site == "SHM01" ~ "SHN",
    Site == "ENM01" ~ "YMR",
    TRUE ~ Site  # keep other values unchanged
  )) |> 
    group_by(Site, Date) |>
  summarise(maxPar = max(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            avgPar = mean(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Load GP
gpDat <- fread(here("Data/GP_dailyData.csv")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp,
    -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs,
    -dPercCon, -wetdry_SW
  ) |>
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |>
  left_join(streamLight, by = c("Site", "Date"))

# Load SE
seDat <- fread(here("Data/SE_dailyData.csv")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    -minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp,
    -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs
  ) |>
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |>
  full_join(seMaint)

# Combine 
allDat <- gpDat |>
  full_join(seDat) |>
  dplyr::select(-excProb, -DOSat.exc) |>
  mutate(
    waterYear = as.factor(calcWaterYear(Date)),
    Season = as.factor(get_season(Date)),
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    DOY = as.numeric(format(Date, "%j")),
         DOY_sin = sin(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date))),
         DOY_cos = cos(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date)))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-totalDO) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(
    excProb = calc_exceedance_prob(Q_1d, rm.Zero = TRUE),
    DOSat.exc = calc_exceedance_prob(avgDO.pctsat, rm.Zero = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

# Calculate stage thresholds for each site
flowThresh <- allDat |>
  drop_na(wetQf) |>
  group_by(Site, wetQf) |>
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(wetQf == "Pooled" & !is.na(mean) & !is.na(sd)) |>
  mutate(thresh = mean + sd) |>
  dplyr::select(Site, thresh)

# Assign flowState based on threshold
allDat <- allDat |>
  left_join(flowThresh, by = "Site") |>
  mutate(
    flowState = case_when(
      is.na(thresh) ~ NA_character_,
      Depth_1d > thresh ~ "Flowing",
      TRUE ~ "Pooled"
    )
  )

rm(streamLight, gpDat, seDat, flowThresh, flowObs)

allDat |> 
  #filter(Site == "KNZ") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = water.temp)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = "Water Temp (\u00B0C)") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 2)

allDat |> 
  #filter(Site == "KNZ") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = avgPar)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, color = "darkgoldenrod1") +
  labs(
    x = "DOY",
    y = expression(PAR~(mu*"mol m"^-2*"s"^-1))) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 2)
```

## Avg To 2 week interval

```{r}
# Function to calculate mode
get_mode <- function(x) {
  # Remove NA values
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  # If empty after removing NAs, return NA
  if(length(x) == 0) return(NA)
  # Get the most common value
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

# Calculate 7-day moving averages by site
weeklyDat <- allDat |>
  dplyr::select(-DOY) |> 
  # Create a week identifier
  mutate(
    Date = floor_date(Date, unit = "week")
  ) |>
  # Group by site and week
  group_by(Site, Date) |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  # Summarize all columns
  summarize(
    # Get mode of flowState
    flowState  = get_mode(flowState),
    # Sum PPT_1d
    PPT_tot = sum(PPT, na.rm = TRUE),
    # For all other numeric columns, calculate the mean
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !matches("PPT"), 
      ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    # For character columns except flowState, take the first non-NA value
    across(
      where(is.character) & !matches("flowState"),
      ~ifelse(all(is.na(.)), NA, na.omit(.)[1])
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(DOY  = as.numeric(format(Date, "%j"))) |> 
  filter(Date > as_date("2021-06-01"))


# Get names of all numeric columns (excluding DOY_sin + DOY_cos which is the x-axis)
numeric_cols <- weeklyDat |> 
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) |> 
  dplyr::select(-DOY) |> 
  names()

# Create a function to generate a plot for each column
create_plot <- function(col_name) {
  ggplot(weeklyDat, aes(x = DOY, y = .data[[col_name]])) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
    labs(
      y = col_name,
      x = ""  
    ) +
    theme_few() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y")
}

# Generate all plots
plots <- map(numeric_cols, create_plot)
for(i in seq_along(plots)) {
  print(plots[[i]])
}

```

## Check 2 week autocorr

```{r}
vars <- c("avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "AlphaCentrality", "upstream_length", "percentConnected","Depth", "Q", "excProb")

dat_long <- weeklyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, all_of(vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(Site, Date), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

calc_acf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  acf_out <- acf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = acf_out$lag[,1,1],
    acf = acf_out$acf[,1,1],
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}
calc_pacf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  pacf_out <- pacf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = pacf_out$lag,
    pacf = pacf_out$acf,
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}

acf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(acf_tbl = list(calc_acf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(acf_tbl)

pacf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(pacf_tbl = list(calc_pacf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(pacf_tbl)

acf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = acf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#D6EAF8", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#0072B2", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "ACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "ACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

pacf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = pacf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#F8CFC3", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Partial Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "PACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "PACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
```

# P-SEM

## NLME

```{r}
# library(nlme)
# library(lme4)
# source(here("Code/Functions/prune_sem.R"))
# 
# vars <- c("DOY", "DOY_sin", "DOY_cos", "AlphaCentrality", "DOSat.exc", "Depth", "DOpctsat.amp", "PPT_tot", "PercWet", 
#           "avgPar", "excProb", "flowState", "headGradient", "percentConnected", "upstream_length", "water.temp")
# 
# semDat <- allDat |>
#   rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
#   rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
#   dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars)) |> 
#   filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
#   dplyr::mutate(
#     across(
#       where(is.numeric) & !matches("PercWet|dPerc|DOY"), 
#       ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
#       .names = "{.col}"
#     )
#   ) |>
#   ungroup() |>
#   drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
#   mutate(#flowState = factor(flowState),
#     # flowState = case_when(flowState == "Pooled"~0,
#     #                       flowState == "Flowing"~1,
#     #                       T~NA), 
#     Site = factor(Site))
```

```{r}
# #### Precipitation ####
# PPT_tot <- lm(PPT_tot ~ DOY, data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# #### Biology ####
# avgPar <- lme(avgPar ~ PPT_tot + DOY, 
#                     random = ~1|Site, 
#                     correlation = corARMA(form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site, p = 2, q = 1), 
#                     data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# water.temp <- lme(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY, 
#                      random = ~1|Site, 
#                      correlation = corARMA(p = 2, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site), 
#                      data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# #### Depth / Q ####
# Depth <- lme(Depth ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY + excProb + 
#                 headGradient + percentConnected + AlphaCentrality + 
#                 upstream_length + PercWet, 
#                 random = ~1|Site, 
#                 correlation = corARMA(p = 1, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site),
#                 data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# excProb <- lme(excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY + 
#                   percentConnected + AlphaCentrality + upstream_length + PercWet, 
#                   random = ~1|Site, 
#                   correlation = corAR1(form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site), 
#                   data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# headGradient <- lme(headGradient ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_tot + DOY + 
#                        percentConnected + AlphaCentrality + upstream_length + PercWet, 
#                        random = ~1|Site, 
#                        correlation =corARMA(p = 2, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site), 
#                        data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# #### Network Connectivity ####
# percentConnected <- lme(percentConnected ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY, 
#                            random = ~1|Site, 
#                            correlation = corARMA(p = 2, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site), 
#                            data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# AlphaCentrality <- lme(AlphaCentrality ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY, 
#                           random = ~1|Site, 
#                           correlation = corARMA(p = 1, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site),
#                           data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# upstream_length <- lme(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY, 
#                           random = ~1|Site, 
#                           correlation = corARMA(p = 1, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site), 
#                           data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# PercWet <- lme(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY, 
#                   random = ~1|Site, 
#                   correlation = corARMA(p = 1, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site),
#                   data = semDat, 
#                na.action = na.omit)
# 
# #### Flow State ####
# flowState_mod <- glm(flowState ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot + DOY + percentConnected + 
#                      AlphaCentrality + upstream_length + PercWet + Depth + excProb,
#                    data = semDat,
#                    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
#                    na.action = na.omit)
# 
# # Get coefficients from your GLM model
# flowCoefs <- coef(flowState_mod)[-1]  # Exclude intercept
# 
# # Create the composite variable using coefficients as weights
# semDat$flowState_composite <- with(semDat, {
#   flowCoefs["water.temp"] * water.temp +
#   flowCoefs["avgPar"] * avgPar +
#   flowCoefs["PPT_tot"] * PPT_tot +  
#   flowCoefs["DOY"] * DOY +
#   flowCoefs["percentConnected"] * percentConnected +
#   flowCoefs["AlphaCentrality"] * AlphaCentrality +
#   flowCoefs["upstream_length"] * upstream_length +
#   flowCoefs["PercWet"] * PercWet +
#   flowCoefs["Depth"] * Depth +
#   flowCoefs["excProb"] * excProb
# })
# #### DO ####
# # DOSat.exc <- lme(DOSat.exc ~ water.temp + PPT_tot + Depth + flowState_pred + 
# #                     excProb + percentConnected + AlphaCentrality + upstream_length + 
# #                     PercWet + headGradient + avgPar + DOY, 
# #                     random = ~1|Site, 
# #                     correlation = corAR1(form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site), 
# #                     data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# # 
# # DOpctsat.amp <- lme(DOpctsat.amp ~ water.temp + PPT_tot + Depth + 
# #                        flowState_pred + excProb + percentConnected + AlphaCentrality + 
# #                        upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient + avgPar + DOY, 
# #                        random = ~1|Site, 
# #                        correlation = corARMA(p = 1, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date)|Site),
# #                        data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# DOSat.exc <- lme(DOSat.exc ~ Depth + flowState_composite + excProb + headGradient + 
#                     DOY + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot, 
#                  random = ~1 | Site, 
#                  correlation = corAR1(form = ~as.numeric(Date) | Site), 
#                  data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# DOpctsat.amp <- lme(DOpctsat.amp ~ Depth + flowState_composite + excProb + headGradient + 
#                        DOY + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_tot, 
#                     random = ~1 | Site, 
#                     correlation = corARMA(p = 1, q = 1, form = ~as.numeric(Date) | Site), 
#                     data = semDat, na.action = na.omit)
# 
# 
# beepr::beep(2)
# 
#   ggplot(semDat, aes(x = DOY, y = flowState_composite)) +
#     geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8, na.rm = T) +
#     theme_few() +
#     theme(
#       legend.position = "bottom",
#       legend.title = element_blank(),
#       strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
#     ) +
#     facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y")
```

```{r}
# check_model(PPT_tot)
# check_model(avgPar)
# check_model(water.temp)
# check_model(Depth)
# check_model(excProb)
# check_model(headGradient)
# check_model(percentConnected)
# check_model(AlphaCentrality)
# check_model(upstream_length)
# check_model(PercWet)
# check_model(flowState_mod)
# check_model(DOSat.exc)
# check_model(DOpctsat.amp)
```

```{r}
# 
# # Define the piecewise SEM
# sem_model <- psem(
#   #### Precipitation ####
#   PPT_tot = PPT_tot,
#   #### Biology ####
#   avgPar = avgPar,
#   water.temp = water.temp,
#   #### Depth / Q ####
#   Depth = Depth,
#   excProb = excProb,
#   headGradient = headGradient,
#   #### Network Connectivity ####
#   percentConnected = percentConnected,
#   AlphaCentrality = AlphaCentrality,
#   upstream_length = upstream_length,
#   PercWet = PercWet,
#   #### Flow State ####
#   flowState_composite = lm(flowState_composite ~ 1, data = semDat, na.action = na.omit),
#   #### DO ####
#   DOSat.exc = DOSat.exc,
#   DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
#   data = semDat
# )
# 
# sem_summary <- summary(sem_model);beep(2)
# plot_sem_graph(sem_summary)#, file = "~/Desktop/origSem_autoCor.png")
# # # Evaluate fit
# # semSummary <- sem_model |> summary()
# # names(semSummary$coefficients) <- c("Response", "Predictor", "Estimate", "Std.Error", "DF",
# #                                      "Crit.Value", "P.Value", "Std.Estimate")
# # semSummary$coefficients <- semSummary$coefficients[, !is.na(colnames(semSummary$coefficients))]
```

```{r}
# pruned_sem <- prune_sem(
#   sem_model,
#   data = semDat,
#   alpha = 0.05,
#   )
# 
# pruned_summary <- summary(pruned_sem)
# plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = "~/Desktop/prunedSem_weekly.png")
```

# SEM

## Correlation

```{r}
library(corrplot)

vars <- c("PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "flowState", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "AlphaCentrality", "upstream_length", "percentConnected","Depth", "Q", "excProb")


semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !matches("PercWet|dPerc|DOY"), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  mutate(#flowState = factor(flowState),
    # flowState = case_when(flowState == "Pooled"~0,
    #                       flowState == "Flowing"~1,
    #                       T~NA), 
    Site = factor(Site))

png(here("Figs/Corr.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

png(here("Figs/Corr_5.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    cor_mat[abs(cor_mat) < 0.5] <- NA
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()

png(here("Figs/Corr_75.png"), width = 840, height = 840)
semDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    cor_mat[abs(cor_mat) < 0.75] <- NA
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle", type = "upper", order = "alphabet", tl.col = "black", tl.pos = "lt", tl.cex = 2,
             cl.pos = "n", na.label = " ", diag = TRUE)
    corrplot(cor_mat, method = "number", type = "lower", order = "alphabet", tl.pos = "n", add = TRUE, number.cex = 1.5, na.label = " ", diag = FALSE)
  })()
dev.off()


allDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(AlphaCentrality = scale(AlphaCentrality)[, 1]) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = PercWet_1d, y = AlphaCentrality)) +
  geom_point(na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "Spectral") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(x = "% Wet", y = "Alpha Centrality") +
  theme_few() +
  facet_wrap(~Site)
```

## All Paths

```{r}
# library(lavaan)
# 
# vars <- c("PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "flowState", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "AlphaCentrality", "upstream_length", "percentConnected","Depth", "Q", "excProb")
# 
# semDat <- allDat |>
#   rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
#   rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
#   dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
#   filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
#   dplyr::mutate(
#     across(
#       where(is.numeric) & !matches("PercWet|dPerc|DOY"), 
#       ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
#       .names = "{.col}"
#     )
#   ) |>
#   ungroup() |>
#   drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
#   mutate(#flowState = factor(flowState),
#     # flowState = case_when(flowState == "Pooled"~0,
#     #                       flowState == "Flowing"~1,
#     #                       T~NA), 
#     Site = factor(Site))
# # 
# # semDat <- semDat |>
# #   group_by(Site) |> 
# #   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
# #   ungroup() 
# 
# # Assign domain groups
# domain_colors <- c(
#   Biology = "#BBBB00",
#   Hydrology = "#E69F00",
#   DO = "#0077BB"
# )
# 
# # Assign each variable to a domain
# var_domains <- c(
#   avgPar = "Biology",
#   PPT_14d = "Biology",
#   water.temp = "Biology",
#   upstream_length = "Hydrology",
#   PercWet = "Hydrology",
#   Depth = "Hydrology",
#   Q = "Hydrology",
#   headGradient = "Hydrology",
#   DOSat.exc = "DO",
#   DOpctsat.amp = "DO"
# )
```

### With Flow State

```{r}
# lav_model <- c('
#   # Biology
#   avgPar ~ PPT_14d
#   water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d
# 
#   # Network Connectivity
#   upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d
#   PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d
# 
#   # Depth/Q
#   Depth ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet
#   Q ~ Depth + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet
# 
#   headGradient ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet
#   
#   # Flow State
#   flowState ~ PercWet + Depth + Q + headGradient + PPT_14d + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length
# 
#   # DO
#   DOSat.exc ~ Depth + Q + flowState + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient
#   DOpctsat.amp ~ Depth + Q + flowState + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient
# 
#   # Residual correlations between network connectivity variables
#   upstream_length ~~ PercWet
# ')
# 
# lav_fit <- sem(lav_model, data = semDat)
# 
# lav_pruned <- iterative_trim_sem(model = lav_model, data = semDat, p_threshold = 0.05, min_std_coef = 0.1)
# lav_pruned_mod <- lav_pruned$final_model
# 
# lav_pruned_fit <- sem(lav_pruned_mod, data = semDat)
# plot_lavaan(lav_fit, file = here("Figs/SEM_allPaths_wFlowState.png"))
# plot_lavaan(lav_pruned_fit, file = here("Figs/SEM_Pruned_wFlowState.png"))
# plot_lavaan_chord(lav_fit, var_domains, domain_colors)
# plot_lavaan_chord(lav_pruned_fit, var_domains, domain_colors)
```

### Without Flow State

```{r}
# lav_model <- c('
#   # Biology
#   avgPar ~ PPT_14d
#   water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d
# 
#   # Network Connectivity
#   upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d
#   PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d
# 
#   # Depth/Q
#   Depth ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet
#   Q ~ Depth + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet
#   headGradient ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet
# 
#   # DO
#   DOSat.exc ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient
#   DOpctsat.amp ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient
# 
#   # Residual correlations between network connectivity variables
#   upstream_length ~~ PercWet
# ')
# 
# 
# lav_fit <- sem(lav_model, data = semDat)
# 
# lav_pruned <- iterative_trim_sem(model = lav_model, data = semDat, p_threshold = 0.05, min_std_coef = 0.1, max_iterations = Inf)
# lav_pruned_mod <- lav_pruned$final_model
# 
# 
# 
# allFit <- sem(lav_pruned_mod, data = semDat)
# plot_lavaan(lav_fit, file = here("Figs/SEM_allPaths.png"))
# plot_lavaan(allFit, file = here("Figs/SEM_Pruned.png"))
# plot_lavaan_chord(lav_fit, var_domains, domain_colors)
# plot_lavaan_chord(allFit, var_domains, domain_colors)
```

## Back to PSEM

```{r}
source(here("Code/Functions/prune_sem.R"))
vars <- c("PPT_tot", "avgPar", "water.temp", "avgDO.pctsat", "headGradient", "flowState", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "PercWet", "AlphaCentrality", "upstream_length", "percentConnected","Depth", "Q", "excProb")

semDat <- allDat |>
  rename_with(~ str_remove(.x, "_1d")) |> 
  rename(PPT_tot = PPT) |> 
  dplyr::select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, all_of(vars), PPT_14d) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !matches("PercWet|dPerc|DOY"), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat) |> 
  mutate(#flowState = factor(flowState),
    # flowState = case_when(flowState == "Pooled"~0,
    #                       flowState == "Flowing"~1,
    #                       T~NA), 
    Site = factor(Site))
# 
# semDat <- semDat |>
#   group_by(Site) |> 
#   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
#   ungroup() 

# Assign domain groups
domain_colors <- c(
  Biology = "#BBBB00",
  Hydrology = "#E69F00",
  DO = "#0077BB"
)

# Assign each variable to a domain
var_domains <- c(
  avgPar = "Biology",
  PPT_14d = "Biology",
  water.temp = "Biology",
  upstream_length = "Hydrology",
  PercWet = "Hydrology",
  Depth = "Hydrology",
  Q = "Hydrology",
  headGradient = "Hydrology",
  DOSat.exc = "DO",
  DOpctsat.amp = "DO"
)
```

### Global Model

```{r}
library(piecewiseSEM)
# Biology
avgPar <- lm(avgPar ~ PPT_14d, 
             data = semDat)
water.temp <- lm(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d, 
                 data = semDat)
# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- lm(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d, 
                      data = semDat)
PercWet <- lm(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d, 
              data = semDat)

# Depth/Q
Depth <-  lm(Depth ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
             data = semDat)
Q <-  lm(Q ~ Depth + avgPar + water.temp + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
         data = semDat)

headGradient <-  lm(headGradient ~ Depth + avgPar + water.temp + Q +  PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
                    data = semDat)

DOSat.exc <- lm(DOSat.exc ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient,
                 data = semDat)
                 
DOpctsat.amp <- lm(DOpctsat.amp ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient + PPT_14d,
                    data = semDat)
# Fit the piecewise SEM
all_fit <- psem(
  # Biology
  avgPar = avgPar,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  # Network Connectivity
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  # Depth/Q
  Depth = Depth,
  Q = Q,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  # DO
  DOSat.exc = DOSat.exc,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  data = semDat
)
all_fit |> summary()

all_pruned <- prune_sem(sem_model =  all_fit, data = semDat)
all_pruned |> summary()


plot_sem_graph(all_fit |> summary())
plot_sem_graph(all_pruned |> summary())
plot_psem_chord(all_fit, var_domains, domain_colors)
plot_psem_chord(all_pruned, var_domains, domain_colors)
```

### Pooled Model

```{r}
pooledDat <- semDat |> 
  filter(flowState == "Pooled")

# Biology
avgPar <- lm(avgPar ~ PPT_14d, 
             data = pooledDat)
water.temp <- lm(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d, 
                 data = pooledDat)
# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- lm(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d, 
                      data = pooledDat)
PercWet <- lm(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d, 
              data = pooledDat)

# Depth/Q
Depth <-  lm(Depth ~ PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
             data = pooledDat)
Q <-  lm(Q ~ Depth + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
         data = pooledDat)

headGradient <-  lm(headGradient ~ Depth + Q +  PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
                    data = pooledDat)

DOSat.exc <- lm(DOSat.exc ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient,
                 data = pooledDat)
                 
DOpctsat.amp <- lm(DOpctsat.amp ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient,
                    data = pooledDat)
# Fit the piecewise SEM
pooled_fit <- psem(
  # Biology
  avgPar = avgPar,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  # Network Connectivity
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  # Depth/Q
  Depth = Depth,
  Q = Q,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  # DO
  DOSat.exc = DOSat.exc,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  data = pooledDat
)
# To summarize results
pooled_fit |>
  summary()

pooled_pruned <- prune_sem(sem_model =  pooled_fit, data = pooledDat)
pooled_pruned |>
  summary()
plot_sem_graph(pooled_fit |> summary())
plot_sem_graph(pooled_pruned |> summary())
plot_psem_chord(pooled_fit, var_domains, domain_colors)
plot_psem_chord(pooled_pruned, var_domains, domain_colors)
```

### Flowing Model

```{r}
flowingDat <- semDat |> 
  filter(flowState == "Flowing")

# Biology
avgPar <- lm(avgPar ~ PPT_14d, 
             data = flowingDat)
water.temp <- lm(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_14d, 
                 data = flowingDat)
# Network Connectivity
upstream_length <- lm(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d, 
                      data = flowingDat)
PercWet <- lm(PercWet ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_14d, 
              data = flowingDat)

# Depth/Q
Depth <-  lm(Depth ~ PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
             data = flowingDat)
Q <-  lm(Q ~ Depth + PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
         data = flowingDat)

headGradient <-  lm(headGradient ~ Depth + Q +  PPT_14d + upstream_length + PercWet, 
                    data = flowingDat)

DOSat.exc <- lm(DOSat.exc ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient,
                 data = flowingDat)
                 
DOpctsat.amp <- lm(DOpctsat.amp ~ Depth + Q + water.temp + avgPar + upstream_length + PercWet + headGradient,
                    data = flowingDat)
# Fit the piecewise SEM
flowing_fit <- psem(
  # Biology
  avgPar = avgPar,
  water.temp = water.temp,
  # Network Connectivity
  upstream_length = upstream_length,
  PercWet = PercWet,
  # Depth/Q
  Depth = Depth,
  Q = Q,
  headGradient = headGradient,
  # DO
  DOSat.exc = DOSat.exc,
  DOpctsat.amp = DOpctsat.amp,
  data = flowingDat
)
# To summarize results
flowing_fit |>
  summary()
flowing_pruned <- prune_sem(sem_model =  flowing_fit, data = flowingDat)
flowing_pruned |>
  summary()

plot_sem_graph(flowing_fit |> summary())
plot_sem_graph(flowing_pruned |> summary())
plot_psem_chord(flowing_fit, var_domains, domain_colors)
plot_psem_chord(flowing_pruned, var_domains, domain_colors)
```

```{r}

## Flowing and Pooled Model Fit
all_fit |>
  summary()
all_pruned |>
  summary()
lapply(all_fit, residuals) |> 
  purrr::imap(~plot(.x, main = paste("Residuals:", .y)))
## Pooled Model Fit
pooled_fit |>
  summary()
lapply(pooled_fit, residuals) |> 
  purrr::imap(~plot(.x, main = paste("Residuals:", .y)))
pooled_pruned |>
  summary()

## Flowing Model Fit
flowing_fit |>
  summary()
lapply(flowing_fit, residuals) |> 
  purrr::imap(~plot(.x, main = paste("Residuals:", .y)))
flowing_pruned |>
  summary()
```
